_meta.role: 灰袍敲鐘人，戴去指手套，攜大沙漏；不列顛城內按時敲鐘報時的役者。對符文、真言、八城領主皆有粗淺見聞，是世界觀資訊提供者；自謙『只是個敲鐘人』。

translations.en: Daver
a man wearing a long grey cloak.
translations.zh: 一名身披灰色長袍之人。

translations.en: He wears gloves with the fingers cut off, and carries a large hourglass with him.
translations.zh: 他戴著去指手套，隨身攜帶一個大沙漏。
translations.note: 去指手套=指尖剪掉之手套

translations.en: "Good $T, friend Avatar."
name
"I'm Daver McCord."
translations.note: len=19 緊；省『我乃』改為文言『也』收尾；McCord → 麥柯

translations.en: job
"Every hour of the day, I ring the @bell a number of times."
bell
"According to the @numbers on the hourglass, you see."
translations.zh: 「按沙漏上的@numbers（刻數）而定，汝可知。」

translations.en: numb
"Well, I usually know what @time it is up here in my head somehow."
translations.zh: 「呃，我心中大致曉得此刻是何@time時辰。」

translations.en: "But just in case, I start this hourglass at sunup, turning it over every nine hours."
translations.zh: 「但為求保險，日出時翻沙漏起算，每九小時翻轉一次。」

translations.en: time
"It is especially important for those with shops."
"They know when to open for @business, eat lunch, close, and that sort of thing."
translations.zh: 「他們需知何時開門@business（營業）、用午膳、收攤等等。」

translations.en: "Another of Lord British's innovations, this bell thing."
translations.zh: 「此鐘也是不列顛王所創之事物之一。」

translations.en: avat
"You look much taller in person. Woodroffe's painting does not do you @justice."
translations.zh: 「汝本人比畫中為大。伍卓夫之畫未盡@justice（公道）。」
translations.note: 避『許』（5C trail b35c）改寫；Woodroffe → 伍卓夫（glossary）

translations.en: just
"Heh, heh. I know little of that. I'm just the bell-ringer."
translations.zh: 「呵呵。此事我不甚明瞭。我只是個敲鐘人。」

translations.en: open,busi,sort
"Hmmm. I guess that you don't keep a regular schedule, being the @Avatar and all."
translations.zh: 「嗯。想必汝身為@Avatar（聖者），不按常規作息。」

translations.en: "Probably out till all hours, collecting @runes and such."
translations.zh: 「想必夜以繼日，蒐集@runes（符文）之類。」

translations.en: rune
"Magical little things."
"There's a symbol on one side, and a letter on the other."
"Probably spell something out if you put 'em all on a necklace."
translations.zh: 「若全串成項鍊，或可拼出什麼字。」

translations.en: "But that hasn't been done for a long time."
"After the Codex of Ultimate Wisdom was brought back from the underworld,
translations.zh: 「自從終極智慧之寶典從幽冥界取回後，
translations.note: Codex of Ultimate Wisdom → 終極智慧之寶典（glossary）；underworld → 幽冥界

translations.en: Lord @British gave the runes to the lords of the eight cities."
translations.zh: @British（不列顛王）便將符文授予八城之領主。」
translations.note: @British → @不列顛王，保留 @ prefix 供 keyword lookup

translations.en: eigh,citi,gave
"Let's see now." He counts them off on his fingers.
"Minoc, Trinsic, Jhelom, Yew, Skara Brae, Britain, Moonglow..."
translations.zh: 「米諾克、特林希克、傑隆、尤伊、斯卡拉布雷、不列顛城、月華城…」
translations.note: 七城名；用單個 ellipsis 而非雙個以節省 bytes

translations.en: "...Ah yes, and New Magincia. I hear each of the lords knows a @mantra."
translations.zh: 「…啊對了，還有新馬精西亞。聽說每位領主皆知一句@mantra（真言）。」

translations.en: mant
"Haven't the foggiest what those are for."
translations.zh: 「那些東西作何用，我毫無頭緒。」

translations.en: "Something to do with the @shrines, I think."
shri
"Always wanted to visit them. Never had the @time."
translations.zh: 「一直想去拜訪。從不曾有@time時辰。」

translations.en: "Heh, heh, heh!"
lord,brit
"Lord British appointed lords to rule the eight @cities."
translations.zh: 「不列顛王指派領主治理八@cities（城）。」

translations.en: bye
"Until we meet again."
"Sorry, I cannot help you with that."

riddles_additions.en: After the Codex of Ultimate Wisdom was brought back from the underworld, Lord British gave the runes to the lords of the eight cities. Minoc, Trinsic, Jhelom, Yew, Skara Brae, Britain, Moonglow... and New Magincia.
riddles_additions.zh: 自從終極智慧之寶典從幽冥界取回後，不列顛王便將符文授予八城之領主。米諾克、特林希克、傑隆、尤伊、斯卡拉布雷、不列顛城、月華城…啊對了，還有新馬精西亞。聽說每位領主皆知一句@真言。
riddles_additions.ref: Ultima 系列八城八德對應；玩家主線需從八城領主處收齊八符文與八真言。Daver 簡介此設定。
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留城名次序，符合 Ultima 系列正典；用單字 ellipsis 節省 bytes

translator_notes: Daver 為不列顛城內按時敲鐘的閒人，自謙『只是個敲鐘人』；對白偏白話夾古典（『此鐘』『此事』『日出時』）。介紹了八符文-八城-八真言的世界觀（呼應 Ariana/Nan 的符文／Mariah 的真言）。避 5C trail：『餐』(c05c) 改『膳』；『許』(b35c) 改寫句子。Lord British 首次出現用全稱『不列顛王』。McCord → 麥柯（新詞）；Woodroffe 在 glossary 已有。
